_comment: Every code->intent pair RESOLVE_INTENTS has ever held. APPEND-ONLY: never remove a row, never change an intent. admin_alerts rows persist, so deleting a retired producer's row would silently flip already-stored rows from Confirm back to Mark resolved. Retiring a producer means retired:true in RESOLVE_INTENTS, which keeps the pair. Enforced against origin/main by _metaResolveIntentLifecycle.test.ts, because no single-tree assertion can enforce append-only.
